title: SQLancer TLP query with wrong results
poc: SELECT count(*) FROM t0 WHERE (NOT (CAST((t0.c1) IS NULL AS BOOLEAN))) IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Incorrect handling of NULL in SQL query conditions
bug_features_seed: INSERT INTO "sys"."t1" (c0, c1, c2) VALUES (1, NULL, 10.50);
INSERT INTO "sys"."t1" (c0, c1, c2) VALUES (2, 'test', NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "sys"."t1" WHERE (NOT (c1 IS NULL)) IS NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "sys"."t1" WHERE (c2 IS NOT NULL) OR (c1 IS NULL);
